title: Climate dataset catalog entry
description: One curated entry describing a public climate dataset: what it is, where it canonically lives, how to access it, where it is archived, and whether it is still reachable. The catalog maps data; it does not host it.

id.description: Stable kebab-case slug. Must match the filename (minus .yaml). Never reused.

description.description: One or two sentences: what the dataset is and why it matters.

topics.description: Free-tag topics for discovery, e.g. [temperature, sea-ice, anomalies].

canonical_url.description: Current authoritative home of the data.

former_climate_gov_url.description: Where climate.gov used to surface it, if known. Null if N/A.

method.description: How the data is actually retrieved.

auth_note.description: What credential is needed, e.g. 'free NCEI CDO token'.

format.description: File/serialization formats offered, e.g. [csv, json, netcdf, geotiff].

archive.description: Where copies live, beyond the canonical source.

noaa_s3.description: AWS Open Data path if mirrored there.

mirror.description: Populated ONLY if this project hosts a copy.

status.description: live=reachable & maintained; moved=URL changed; dark=gone/404; frozen=reachable but no longer updated; mirrored=we hold a copy.

last_checked.description: ISO date the status was last verified (YYYY-MM-DD). The reachability checker writes this back.

checksum.description: Checksum of a mirrored artifact, if archive.mirror is set.

notes.description: Curator notes: caveats, history, why status changed.
